reason: SSOT/RTL contract is not concrete enough for generic cocotb scoreboard generation.

questions.decision_needed: Declare RTL contract clock 'clk' as an input port.
questions.evidence: 'clk' is not in SSOT input ports.
questions.downstream_effect: cocotb cannot start a clock on a missing DUT signal.

questions.decision_needed: Declare RTL contract reset 'rst_n' as an input port.
questions.evidence: 'rst_n' is not in SSOT input ports.
questions.downstream_effect: cocotb cannot apply reset to a missing DUT signal.

questions.decision_needed: Map transaction field 'enable' to a real input port.
questions.evidence: rtl_contract.input_map.enable='registers_CTRL_enable', but 'registers_CTRL_enable' is not an input port.
questions.downstream_effect: The cocotb driver must know which DUT pin receives each FunctionalModel field.

questions.decision_needed: Map transaction field 'mask' to a real input port.
questions.evidence: rtl_contract.input_map.mask='registers_REQ_MASK_mask', but 'registers_REQ_MASK_mask' is not an input port.
questions.downstream_effect: The cocotb driver must know which DUT pin receives each FunctionalModel field.

questions.decision_needed: Map transaction field 'requests' to a real input port.
questions.evidence: rtl_contract.input_map.requests='req_i_NUM_REQ_1_0', but 'req_i_NUM_REQ_1_0' is not an input port.
questions.downstream_effect: The cocotb driver must know which DUT pin receives each FunctionalModel field.

next_action: Repair SSOT/RTL contract through ATLAS, rerun /ssot-rtl, then rerun /tb.
